programme.title: Entertainment Tonight
programme.desc: News and features about performers, productions and the milieu.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: After losing two alliance members, castaways spend the next day picking up the pieces of their broken alliance; the castaways face off against a surprise challenger during this week's individual immunity competition.

programme.title: America's Culinary Cup
programme.desc: Whipping up 30 identical fish dishes may be a team effort, but when push comes to shove, it's every chef for themselves as they scramble to deliver what the judges are looking for.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful
programme.desc: Set in the glamorous world of the Los Angeles fashion scene, this soap opera focuses on the wealthy and powerful Forrester family; its company, Forrester Creations, is the leader in the fashion industry.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Joey witnesses an argument, then makes Martin an offer; Vernon gets an important update from Madison; Anita gets a surprise visit from Vanessa; Ashley finds herself stuck between a rock and a hard place; Ren's news causes Jacob and Smitty to panic.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Zayn tells Drew about his new album and then he and Drew get tattoos together.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: It's a special Design by Drew with Will Taylor and Arhaus.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Child Left in a Runaway Car?; Beer and Bones Over the Balcony!
programme.desc: A teacher denies leaving her child in her car, which somehow crashed into a co-worker's vehicle; a landlady accuses a tenant of throwing trash from her balcony.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Yoga Promo Gone Bad!; Broken Tooth Tiff; Happy Dog Reunion!
programme.desc: A woman says a yoga studio owner she met in line at a restaurant gave her $2,000 for used gym equipment; a woman wants her boyfriend to repay her for a loan for dental work; a dog's new owners want to return him after learning he will need surgery.

programme.desc: Jill Kargman tells Drew about her new movie "Influenced.".

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: The Tattoo Artist's Apprentice; Casanova Dodges Payback?
programme.desc: A tattoo artist resists returning an apprenticeship fee, saying the apprentice was a slacker; a man accused of having a secret girlfriend is sued by his ex for repayment of a loan.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: When Ex-Girlfriends Fight!; Burning Down the Condo!
programme.desc: A woman says she had to bathe at a restaurant and sleep in a car after her ex locked her out; a landlady blames her tenant for a fire in his condo, but he passes the buck on to his friend, who was smoking a cigar.
